fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer number the reminder is for.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer the reminder is for.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer the reminder is for.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city name of the customer the reminder is for.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the issued reminder.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you communicate with the customer the reminder is for.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The content will be printed on the related document.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date that the reminder was issued on.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when payment of the amount on the reminder is due.

fields.name: Reminder Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reminder terms code for the reminder.

fields.name: Fin. Charge Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the involved finance charges in case of late payment.

fields.name: Reminder Level
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reminder's level.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the remaining amounts on the reminder lines.

fields.name: Additional Fee
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the additional fee amounts on the reminder lines.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the reminder from which the issued reminder was created.

fields.name: Add. Fee per Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the fee is distributed on individual reminder lines.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date for the reminder.

fields.name: Canceled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the issued reminder has been canceled.

fields.name: Company Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account to use for bank information when the document is printed.
